writing.task1:
Dear Property Manager
On Sept 3 at 8:30 am and Sept 9 at 6:15 pm, the elevators were closed for maintenance without notice. Many of us on higher floors had long delays. Please post a clear schedule of future work and arrange a plan, such as porter help or priority times for residents. I also ask that some rent credit or small compensation be given for the repeated trouble
Thank you
writing.task2: I agree that public offices should share audit trails in machine-readable form. This makes big choices easier to check and keeps trust high. For example, the World Bank saw less fraud in 2021 when contract data was put online in clear formats. Some say this hurts privacy or gives too much data. But if names are hidden and data is shown in simple layers, we still get openness without risk
writing.task3: Organic Search brings strong intent and low cost/lead ($0.60) but modest CTR (3.8%). Paid Social reaches broad audiences and converts slightly higher (3.0%) yet is costlier ($1.85/lead). Email is cheapest ($0.35/lead) with high engagement (41% open, 6.5% CTR) but weaker conversions (1.4%). A smart mix is to lean on Email for efficiency, sustain Organic Search for intent-driven leads, and use Paid Social to expand reach. Run an A/B test on email subject lines to lift conversions. KPI: cost per qualified lead
